findings.evidence: <main> at line 27 contains another <main> at line 28. Only one <main> landmark is valid per document.

findings.description: Repeated page header/footer content in HTML
findings.evidence: The following text blocks repeat 3+ times, likely page headers/footers that should not appear in the body: 'sab – what it is' (3x).

findings.description: Nested ellipse diagram showing relationship between Water Supply Planning and River Basin Modeling is missing in the HTML, replaced by plain text labels only.
findings.evidence: PDF page 10 shows a Venn-style diagram with a larger green ellipse labeled 'Water Supply Planning' containing a smaller orange/peach ellipse labeled 'River Basin Modeling', visually conveying a subset relationship. The HTML renders only the text 'Water Supply Planning' and 'River Basin Modeling' as plain text lines without any diagram.

findings.description: The nested-ellipses diagram on PDF page 10 ('Modeling Supports Planning') showing 'River Basin Modeling' nested inside 'Water Supply Planning' is missing as an image. The HTML renders only two plain-text paragraphs, losing the visual relationship conveyed by the diagram.
findings.evidence:
PDF page 10 contains a concentric-ellipse diagram with 'Water Supply Planning' in the outer ellipse and 'River Basin Modeling' in the inner ellipse. HTML section 'Modeling Supports Planning' has only

Water Supply Planning

River Basin Modeling

with no tag for the diagram.
